basics.name: Brandon Summers
basics.label: Principal Software Engineer
basics.tagline: Engineering leader with 15+ years of experience driving impactful projects, mentoring teams, and modernizing infrastructure across multiple industries.

work.name: iSpot.tv
work.summary: Principal engineer in the Product Engineering org working across multiple teams and directly with VPs.
highlights: Architected and delivered a new programmatic advertising outcomes pipeline end-to-end, from TDP/TDR authorship through implementation, opening up new revenue opportunities
Prototyped an AdCP Signals Agent service from scratch to explore new AI based programmatic advertising opportunities for our customers
Led observability platform migration from DataDog/Splunk to OTEL/Dash0 across the entire product org, standardizing monitoring capabilities and reducing costs
Established best practices and formalized engineering standards across teams (RFCs, feature flags, Schema First API Design, trunk-based development)
Built and standardized team tooling and infrastructure, including a custom CLI to improve developer experience
Led infrastructure migration to a standardized AWS account architecture with Kubernetes and ArgoCD in partnership with DevOps/SRE teams
Delivered high-impact, customer-facing features across multiple projects with direct revenue implications
Reduced technical debt and improved security posture through systematic collaboration and modernization efforts
Mentored developers on best practices, implementation approaches, and career development
Optimized service performance, including 2x improvement in queue processor throughput and 60%+ reduction in Docker build times

Led infrastructure-as-code and CI/CD modernization efforts by migrating legacy Terraform to Terragrunt-based implementation, and Jenkins to CircleCI/Airflow, improving reliability and reducing technical debt
Evangelized successful team processes and created AI guidance documentation across the organization

work.name: Upstart
work.summary: Drove microservices migration, critical financial rule implementation, and Salesforce integration to support rapid growth initiatives.
highlights: Decomposed monolithic services into microservices to improve development velocity and reduce technical debt
Worked across multiple teams to quickly implement critical loan funding rules during macro-economic shifts
Integrated Salesforce ecosystems to enhance marketing channel efficiency and lead tracking

work.name: iSpot.tv
work.summary: Modernized core architecture and delivery workflows by consolidating data into a unified REST API, automating infrastructure with Terraform, and migrating legacy CI/CD to CircleCI to reduce technical debt.
highlights: Led development of new unified REST API that consolidated data consumption across all consumers and clients
Led project to rewrite Admin panel in modern framework
Took over team-specific DevOps work from previous engineer
Containerized legacy projects and implemented Terraform-based infrastructure management
Built new deployment tool that streamlined our development workflow
Aided migration from Jenkins to CircleCI for many projects, improving build times, reliability, and reducing technical debt

work.name: DrivingSales, LLC
work.summary: Lead Full-stack developer on an analytics platform, architected data processing and collection capabilities and improved scalability.

work.name: BoxWave
work.summary: Full-stack developer working on custom ERP system and e-commerce website, as well as all new web related projects.

work.name: Seven Springs Sales, LLC
work.summary: Full-stack developer of working on e-commerce web applications and internal tools.
